content.en:
Origin Boundary Sea.

Dreadnought Pavilion.

This is also a rather ancient force in the Origin Realm Sea, with one Ten-Realm-level Master, three Nine-Realm-level Masters, and a large number of ordinary Eternal Masters.

Therefore, the influence of this force in the Origin Realm Sea is not small.

And yet this day.

The Eternal Masters of the Dreadnought Headquarters found the area outside shrouded in darkness.

"It's not good, there is a strong enemy attack!"

The eternal controllers of the Dreadnought Pavilion changed drastically one by one.

In the depths of the Dreadnought Pavilion, a big man walked out, and he was none other than the Ten Realm-level controllers of the Dreadnought Pavilion, the Dreadnought Ancestor.

"This is the Great Dark Nest, the Black Ancestor's technique beyond the top Origin Control Technique!"

The face of the fearless ancestor changed greatly.

He had experienced the era of the Black Ancestor, so he was very familiar with the Black Ancestor.

When he thought that Heizu was coming, he panicked.

Immediately.

His other clone of the will began to ask for help from some of his best friends.

But if it doesn't work, he can't guarantee it.

At this time, he walked out of the Dreadnought Pavilion, looked into the depths of the Dark Nest, bent down and said respectfully: "Black Ancestor, you won't be a guest in my Fearless Pavilion, will you?

Black Ancestor?

Some unknown Eternal Masters trembled when they heard this name, this is an incomparably terrifying forbidden name!

"Hahaha, Fearless Ancestor, you still remember my dark nest, but you are too wasteful, after such a long time, your strength doesn't seem to have changed much!"

Rumble!

The Black Ancestor walked out from the depths of the Dark Nest, staring at the Fearless Ancestor, there was no gentleness or kindness, some were just murderous.

"Black Ancestor, how can you let me and the Dreadnought Pavilion go?"

Fearless Ancestor Dao.

"Do you think it's possible?" Black Ancestor said coldly: "At the beginning, I invited you to join my forces, but you didn't do it, but betrayed my secret of cultivating the Heaven Snatching Technique, and then you escaped from the Origin Realm Sea, otherwise, my affairs may not be exposed, and the Primordial Ancestor will not seal me." Do you think that if I am permanently sealed, you will dare to escape back? Hahaha, now that I am out of trouble, I am just using you to practice!"

Immediately, Heizu made a move!

Rumble!!!!

Countless black palms emerged from the dark nest, grabbing them from the endless time and space.

Many of the Eternal Masters want to escape, but they can't.

The Dark Nest blocked the endless time and space, and unless they had the strength to match or surpass the Black Ancestor, they would not be able to break the blockade of the Dark Nest.

The Great Dark Lair is like a lair, with billions of layers, completely enveloping this place.

In a flash.

One by one, the Eternal Masters were grabbed by the big black hands, pulled into the depths of the dark nest, and sealed them one by one, even the three Nine Realm-level Masters did not have any strength to resist, and they were all sealed.

In the blink of an eye, only the Dreadnought Ancestor was left here.

"Aren't you running away?"

Heizu asked.

"I can't escape!"

Dreadnought Ancestor smiled bitterly.

He was only the weakest level of the Ten Realm-level controllers, while the Black Ancestor was the most powerful, and the difference in strength between the two was too great.

If it weren't for the Dark Lair, there was still hope for him to escape.

But now, he can't escape.

Moreover, his current body is a real body, not a will clone, if the will clone falls, it will only be a greater loss, but once the real body falls, it will really die.

"Black Ancestor, I have so many eternal controllers in the Fearless Pavilion, it's enough for you to cultivate, why bother with me, I'm a waste, and I can't threaten you!"

"Hahaha, if you were like this at the beginning, where did you come from today?"

Hei Zu did not hesitate, and directly killed the fearless ancestor.

The Fearless Ancestor knew that he couldn't beat it, but he still resisted.

After only a few moves, the Fearless Ancestor was severely injured.

Soon, countless dark hands bound the body of the Fearless Ancestor, dragging him into the dark lair.

In the depths of the Dark Nest, the power of the entire Dark Nest was suppressed layer by layer, completely leaving the Fearless Ancestor without the power to resist and falling into a sleeping seal.

At this point, the Fearless Pavilion, extinguished!

"Close!"

The Black Ancestor put away the Great Dark Lair.

The Great Nest of Darkness that enveloped this area continued to shrink, and finally entered the body of the Black Ancestor.

Immediately, the Black Ancestor began to perform the Heaven Snatching Technique, and with the Dark Nest, it instantly took away the Dao Perception from many Eternal Controllers.

Rumble!!!!

Countless insights, so that the dark body of the path grew rapidly, one more change after another, although many of the changes of the path are repeated, but this time there are more eternal controllers absorbed, so the progress is still great.

"Very good, I have a feeling that if a Dao is raised to a billion changes, it will undergo transformation, but most of the Ten Realms-level masters will not go to the Enlightenment after comprehending hundreds of millions of kinds at most, and the more they comprehend, the more difficult it becomes, and it is almost impossible to comprehend the billions of changes that make the Dao, even those great beings who transcend the Ten Realms level, I am afraid that they will not be able to comprehend a Dao into a billion changes. However, there is hope for my Heaven-Snatching Technique. "

Heizu said excitedly.

In the past, there were those great beings, and he still had some scruples.

But now, he can do whatever he wants, and who can stop him?

Even if there is a Ten Realm-level controller with the same strength as him, it is only to compete with him, but it can't kill him, he can completely stop fighting him, and go to other places to capture the eternal master, and then use the Heaven Snatching Technique to absorb the changes of the Dao.

And.

He can also develop his power and let his subordinates go to the end of the realm to collect resources, and he doesn't need to go out at all, and the Primordial Ancestors can't help themselves.

......

Soon, some of the Eternal Masters came to the Dreadnought.

"The Dreadnought Pavilion is gone, all the Eternal Masters are gone, and the other creatures under the Eternal Masters have all been reduced to ashes. "

"Peeping through time and space, it is the dark nest of the Black Ancestor, and nothing can be snooped on except the dark nest. "

"Heizu has done it to His Excellency Fearless, it should be that Fearless Ancestor cheated Heizu in the first place, and Heizu took revenge, right?"

"Don't forget, Black Ancestor is the creator of the Heaven Snatching Technique, he wants to practice the Heaven Snatching Technique, do you think he will let us Eternal Masters go, Fearless Ancestor is only the first, and there will be more Eternal Masters killed by him later!"

"We have to consult with the Black Decay Controller, and only they can deal with the Black Ancestor, we can't deal with it!"

Immediately, these eternal masters left one by one, for fear of being killed by the Black Ancestor.

The other side.

Ye Tian also quickly learned the news that the Fearless Pavilion was killed by the Black Ancestor, and he was immediately a little surprised.

Heizu's movements were too fast, and as soon as he got out of trouble, he couldn't wait to make a move.
